title: How to share files from one board to another?

posts.author: brianr (Brian Reynolds)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there

Wondering is there a better way than i am presently doing

File A in Shared Board A in Workspace A - I want to share to Private Board B in Workspace B

At present i am downloading and uploading - is there an easier route

Also a question

Can i avoid clients seeing i have read a message of theirs?
